case_title: MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION VS KIN WO CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $869.60 FILED BY MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KIN WO CONSTRUCTION AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIN WO CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKINLEY EQUIPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIN WO CONSTRUCTION $869.60 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $929.60, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR $869.60, IF PREVIOUSLY PAID. OFF CALENDARED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
